entries.definition: Primary privileged user that should be created first and should retain at least one backup credential.
Regular enrolled person that should be added only after an administrator already exists.
Numeric password credential enrolled from the user-management flow and validated immediately after creation.
Biometric credential captured through repeated contact on the sensor until the lock confirms the enrollment.
Primary Beslock-facing app flow observed for e-Orbit onboarding and remote control.
Observed ecosystem and alternate naming surface for the same onboarding family used by the lock.
OEM-mentioned app variant that is not yet approved as the primary commercial route.
Observed onboarding flow in which the phone presents a QR code to the lock camera after network selection.
Fallback Wi-Fi onboarding mode that should remain editorially distinct from QR pairing.
App-generated credential family that currently has document evidence for one-time and unlimited modes.
Supplier model family attached to e-Orbit in the OEM specification sheet.
Observed feature family mentioned in the OEM sources as part of the local configuration and access system.
